message:
fix: mitigate TOCTOU gap in witness Manager.Start zombie kill (gt-vlyc)

Between IsAgentAlive returning false (zombie detected) and KillSession
executing, the agent could restart (slow initialization) or the session
could be replaced by another process. The kill would then destroy a
healthy session.

Add a grace period with double-check: record session creation time,
wait 500ms, then re-verify agent liveness and session identity before
proceeding with the kill. Abort if the agent came alive or the session
was replaced (different creation timestamp).
